approvedBy: Steve via Codex main session overnight approval
approvalSource: Steve approved the overnight Dev-Hub intelligence build and instructed Codex to keep going, park blocked work, and continue safe sprint slices across the intelligence pipe.
scopeSummary: Expose a read-only Dev Hub business-source pipeline triage for FUB, KPI/Supabase, Sheets, Owners/Freedom, Finance, ClickUp, and Drive.
constraints: Do not run FUB, KPI, Sheets, ClickUp, Drive, source sync, extraction, connector probes, login, Browserbase, paid/private source work, or external writes.
Do not write atoms, facts, chunks, synthesis rows, action routes, destination records, backlog cards, Scoper cards, Portfolio records, Current Sprint overlays, or approval records.
Do not auto-promote Director recommendations, source gaps, or business-source findings into backlog or Scoper.
Do not send Telegram, email, Slack, Agent Feedback, public messages, or Harlan notifications outside the governed ship gate.
Fail proof if a stale business source is counted complete or if the readback performs any source/intelligence/destination mutation.
